content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Strong broad-based rally with Nifty +1.38%, Auto +2.29%, Realty +2.65%, and IT +1.48% leading. VIX down ~6% to 16.98 indicates fear easing. However, the rally is sharp and our portfolio is already 50% deployed with multiple positions in the green — focus should be locking in gains via trailing SLs rather than chasing breakouts.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24050,
      "nifty_resistance": 24500
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1045.12,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "HOLD-equivalent — current SL of 1045.12 is already above entry (984) locking ~6% gain. Stock at 1061 with momentum intact post strong Q4 (PAT +19% YoY, AUM Rs 90k cr, GNPA <1%). Bullish catalyst still active. No-op MODIFY actually — switching to HOLD via position_actions instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Gold ETF as macro hedge. -2.6% drawdown but SL at 119 still intact (1.4% away). Iran de-escalation pressuring gold short-term but Fed uncertainty and central bank buying remain structural bid. Hold the hedge — losing the hedge after a small drawdown defeats the purpose."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1445.00,
      "new_target": 1500.00,
      "confidence": 0.78,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +3.7% with stock at fresh 52w high (1465). SL already at 1445 = above entry 1412.94, locking ~2.3% gain. Q4 PAT +27%, FMCG sector leader. Keeping target at 1500 and SL at 1445 — no change needed since SL already trailed above entry. This is a no-op; using HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Thin +0.5% gain, today's red candle (-0.89%). SL at 401 (0.86% below) is tight. Q4 results May 15 catalyst pending. Power sector strong overall. Hold SL — no profit cushion to trail yet."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.6% with SL at 1745 already above entry 1734 (locking small gain). Organon acquisition is double-edged — large debt addition. MACD bearish crossover noted. Keep tight SL, let target 1810 work. No change."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 319.00,
      "new_target": 330.00,
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Thin +0.5% gain. SL already at 319 (0.5% from entry). At 52w high 322 — slight breakout. Not ready to trail without more cushion. No-op — using HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 478.00,
      "new_target": 495.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +3.1% on +6.95% move today, breaking 52w high. SL at 475 already above entry 469 (locking +1.3%). Per trailing mandate (P&L >2%, SL should be at min entry — already met) and approaching +4% threshold. Tightening SL further to 478 to protect more of the today's strong move; target intact at 495."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HINDZINC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.1% gain. SL 615 above entry 612. Stock goes ex-dividend tomorrow (Rs 11/share) — mechanical price drop expected which may trigger SL artificially. Considered exit pre-ex-div but Q4 PAT +67.6% strong; staying in for the dividend & post-div recovery thesis. Holding SL as-is."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1045.12,
      "reasoning": "SL already trailed above entry locking +6% gain. Stock at 1061 with intact momentum toward target 1110. No further tightening needed yet — let it run."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 119.00,
      "reasoning": "Macro hedge function — small unrealized loss is acceptable cost of insurance. SL at 119 (1.4% away) gives room for gold to digest US-Iran headlines."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1445.00,
      "reasoning": "SL at 1445 already above entry 1412.94 locking +2.3%. Stock at 52w high — let target 1500 work. No-op MODIFY avoided."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 401.00,
      "reasoning": "Insufficient profit cushion to trail. SL at 401 (0.86%) tight. Q4 results May 15 ahead — stay disciplined."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1745.00,
      "reasoning": "SL above entry locking small gain. Organon deal injects balance sheet uncertainty — keep tight risk management. No change."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 319.00,
      "reasoning": "SL already 0.5% from entry. Need more cushion before tightening further. At 52w high resistance — wait for breakout confirmation."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 478.00,
      "reasoning": "+3.1% with strong +6.95% breakout day. Trailing SL up from 475 to 478 to lock more of the intraday move. Volume light (0.5x) on breakout though, so not aggressive. Risk-reward still favorable to target 495."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDZINC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 615.00,
      "reasoning": "Ex-dividend tomorrow — Rs 11 mechanical drop will likely trigger SL at 615. Risk of artificial stop-out, but dividend Rs 11 effectively offsets that. Strong Q4 (+67% PAT) supports holding through. Accept that SL may execute on ex-div mechanics."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "Today is a strong broad rally + several Q4 results announcements (BAJFINANCE, BHARTIARTL, IIFL post-market). Most names of interest (RELIANCE, BHARTIARTL, MARUTI, CEATLTD, M&MFIN) are extended on the day — chasing 3-7% moves into close offers poor risk-reward. IIFL flagged BEARISH with 10% intraday plunge April 24 + management change pre-results = avoid. CEATLTD already faded from 3950 to 3676 — failed gap-up, not a buy here. M&MFIN +11% post-results yesterday already + flat today — wait for pullback to 310. BAJFINANCE is pre-results, no entry. Will reassess tomorrow when results reactions stabilize.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 50% deployed across 8 names with +1.26% unrealized for the session — solid day. Performance context shows 14% win rate over rolling 5d with profit factor 0.4x — clear evidence of overtrading and weak entry quality. Right answer today is DEFENSE, not adding more positions on a +1.4% Nifty day at extended levels. No new entries. Existing pending orders (BANDHANBNK, GLENMARK, PHARMABEES, TATAPOWER) left as-is — let limits work or expire. Sector concentration acceptable: Energy (NTPC + POWERGRID + COALINDIA) ~22% of capital — at the edge of the cluster discipline rule (~20%); no further energy adds. HINDZINC ex-div tomorrow is the main known risk event."
}
